themes.headline: CEO succession announced: Vetri Subramaniam to assume MD & CEO from Feb 1, 2026
themes.detail: Imtaiyaz Qureshi to serve as Strategic Advisor through Jun 12, 2026. UTI Foundation Day chosen for symbolic baton-pass.

themes.headline: UTI market cap > ₹18,000 cr — 3x since 2020 listing
themes.detail: AUM growth ₹3.99L cr (2019) → ₹22.42L cr (Sep 2025). 5.6x AUM growth over 6 years.

themes.headline: Industry: retail folios 19.77 cr; retail AUM ₹44.61L cr (equity + hybrid + solution)
themes.detail: Total industry folio count 25.19 cr. Total AUM ₹75.61L cr.

themes.headline: Q2 reflected some investor caution: Equity MF inflows fell 9%
themes.detail: Geopolitical + tariff-related volatility. India's structural strength still intact.

events.label: Vetri Subramaniam to assume MD & CEO from Feb 1, 2026

quotes.text: Under our collective efforts, UTI AMC's market capitalization has grown three-fold since our 2020 listing.
quotes.speaker: Imtaiyaz Qureshi, outgoing MD & CEO
